heading: Sale of lots
label: 367 Sale of lots
text: The Secretary of the Interior may direct the public sale of all unsold Government lots in Hot Springs National Park, and not permanently reserved on , at the city of Hot Springs, after having had the same reappraised, and also advertised as required by law, and no lot shall be sold at less than the appraised price.March 3, 1891
notes: Change of Name“Hot Springs National Park” substituted in text for “Hot Springs Reservation” pursuant to act .Mar. 4, 1921
